title: ActivityRetentionPolicy
description: Per-tenant, per-log_name override on top of the module-level default retention (90 days). Enterprise entitlement `activity_retention_extended` gates the write path — without it, the default applies uniformly. `log_name` is optional (NULL = applies to every log_name in the tenant); when set, only activities on that log_name follow this override. `retention_days` is between 30 (never shorter than 1 month of forensic memory) and 730 (regulator-hold ceiling — a compliance officer setting this to 730 must document the override in `override_reason` per SOC 2). Composite unique on `(tenant_id, log_name)` partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — one policy per (tenant, log_name) pair.

id.description: Prefixed ULID: `art_<26 chars>` (Activity ReTention — distinct from `arp_` which is AuditRetentionPolicy).

log_name.description: Restricts the policy to a specific log_name. NULL = applies to every log_name in the tenant (the default). When set, must match a name in data/log-names-catalog.json.

retention_days.description: How many days to retain activity rows on this scope. Between 30 (floor — never shorter than 1 month of forensic memory) and 730 (regulator-hold ceiling). Default fallback (when no policy exists): 90 days from config.

override_reason.description: Free-text justification for the override. Required. Retained on the audit stream indefinitely (`HasAudit` composes into `audits` — a compliance officer can later verify why the ceiling was raised).

expires_at.description: Optional wall-clock at which the policy reverts to the module default. NULL = permanent. Regulator-hold overrides (>365d) SHOULD set expires_at.

indexes.name: activity_retention_policies_tenant_log_unique
indexes.description: One active policy per (tenant, log_name) pair. Partial unique to allow re-creation after soft-delete.

indexes.name: activity_retention_policies_tenant_retention_days_index
indexes.description: Powers the retention-summary view — 'show me every policy above 365 days in this tenant'.

retention_days.description: 30..730 inclusive. 30 = 1 month; 90 = default; 365 = 1 year (Enterprise entitlement); 730 = regulator hold.

override_reason.description: Human-readable justification. Min 20 chars — matches the reason-quality rule from grants.

is_extended.description: Computed. `retention_days > 90` — this override is beyond the config default.

is_regulator_hold.description: Computed. `retention_days > 365` — this is a regulator-hold level override.
